title: [ExportVerilog] Add option to enforce label on assert/assume/cover
body:
We've seen cases where commercial tools would reject verification statements (assert/assume/cover) if they don't have a label. We *do* have support for labels on these ops, it would be great to add an emission option to `ExportVerilog` to add a generic label like `assert42` to all verification ops that don't have an explicit label already.

There has also been some precedence to mangle location information into the generic name, like `assert__MyFile_sv_L1355_C8`.
